subcodes.first_line: O my friends and helpers! The call is the call of servitude, and the manifestation is the manifestation of thraldom at the sacred Threshold of all [3.5s]... ...Erelong will your brethren from Europe and America journey to Persia. There they will promote to an unprecedented degree the interests of art and industry
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران من و یاوران من بانگ بانگ عبودیت است و جلوه جلوه رقیت آستان مقدس کل
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
